targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) as total_emetteurs FROM cartographie.emetteurs WHERE derniere_detection > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
SELECT type_emetteur, count(*) FROM cartographie.emetteurs GROUP BY type_emetteur
SELECT bande_ism, count(*) as nb_signaux FROM cartographie.signaux GROUP BY bande_ism ORDER BY nb_signaux DESC
SELECT nom, type_emetteur, niveau_menace, frequence_mhz, puissance_dbm FROM cartographie.emetteurs WHERE niveau_menace > 50 ORDER BY niveau_menace DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT time_bucket('10 seconds', timestamp) as time, frequence_centre_mhz, puissance_dbm FROM cartographie.signaux WHERE timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' ORDER BY time
SELECT timestamp, emetteur_id, type_alerte, niveau_menace, description FROM cartographie.alertes WHERE timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', timestamp) as time, count(*) as nb_detections FROM cartographie.signaux WHERE timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
